name: components/alert-dialog
description: A critical modal dialog that interrupts the user to confirm a significant or irreversible action. Provides a complete composition system with AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogOverlay, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogAction, and AlertDialogCancel. Action and Cancel buttons are pre-styled with destructive and outline variants respectively. Built on Kobalte AlertDialog with full ARIA alertdialog semantics, focus trapping, and keyboard dismissal.
useCases: Destructive confirmations before deleting an account, project, or database record
Unsaved-changes warnings when navigating away from a dirty form
Logout or session-expiration prompts that require explicit user acknowledgment
Legal or compliance consent dialogs that block further interaction until confirmed
usage: import { AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogOverlay, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel, AlertDialogPortal } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/alert-dialog"
